name: World Sandbox
description:
Step into a dynamic world where every person feels real. Towns bustle, forests breathe, and characters will always react with their own goals, emotions, and memories. You control the story. Create scenarios, explore relationships, spark conflicts, or just wander. No limits. No scripts. Just pure roleplay freedom.

yes hi this is a bot i made more for myself cause i noticed i keep getting ideas and play them out using this. figured i'd make one thats public.
